claimText: The Draft Guidelines for Underground Coal Gasification (UCG) require companies to maintain an escrow account with the Coal Controller Organization (CCO) to ensure scientific mine closure.
evidenceExcerpt: To ensure scientific mine closure, companies will be required to maintain an escrow account with the Coal Controller Organization (CCO).
examUse: Can be used in a statement-based question regarding the regulatory framework for UCG and the specific responsibilities of the Coal Controller Organization.
distractorHooks: Escrow account is maintained with the Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change (MoEFCC)
Escrow account is maintained with the Reserve Bank of India (RBI)
Escrow account is maintained with the Ministry of Mines
